description: You are a mastering engineer preparing to master a client's mix. Set up the session for A/B comparison by renaming the existing audio track to 'Main Mix' and importing a reference file from /home/ga/Audio/samples/ to a new track named 'Reference'. The 'Reference' track must be muted and routed directly to the System/Hardware Playback outputs to bypass the Master bus. Additionally, insert a mastering plugin (e.g., ACE Limiter, ACE Compressor, or ACE EQ) on the Master bus and save the session.
